title: Maytenus bailadillana
taxonomy: Maytenus bailadillana is a species of plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the bittersweet family. The Celastraceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, with over 1,000 species worldwide. Maytenus bailadillana is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is often classified into the genus Maytenus, which includes species native to the Americas, Africa, and Asia. The classification of Maytenus bailadillana provides insights into the plant's evolutionary history and its relationships with other species in the Celastraceae family.
